why_not_live_ready: The referral-needed bucket is mostly stable already, with runtime on service_referral_status_root_v1 for most tested prompts.
The remaining disagreement is concentrated in one narrow wording family around 'նեղ մասնագետի ուղեգիր է պետք'.

Closely adjacent phrasings already split differently at runtime: 'նեղ մասնագետի ուղեգիր է պետք' routes to routing_specialist_referral_confusion_v1, while 'նեղ մասնագետի մոտ ուղեգիր է պե՞տք' routes to service_referral_status_root_v1.
That near-minimal phrasing difference means a live override rule is still too brittle and could steal stable routing behavior.

routing_arrangement_examples: մասնագետի համար նախ բժիշկ պիտի տեսնե՞մ
eligibility_examples: մասնագետի մոտ անվճար կարո՞ղ եմ գնալ
protected_neighbor_check.result: Neighbors remained stable and therefore must remain excluded from any future pilot rule.

future_rule_requirements_before_reconsid: A referral-needed-only rule must explain the 'նեղ մասնագետ' wording split without stealing routing/arrangement prompts.
The rule must remain fully inactive on any free-care or coverage phrasing.
Replay evidence must show improvement on more than one repeated disagreement family.

recommendation.reason: No narrower referral-needed-only override can be stated confidently enough from current evidence.
